Boeing Announces Second Quarter Deliveries. **Boeing (NYSE: BA)** reported second quarter 2026 deliveries across its Commercial Airplanes and Defense, Space & Security programs. Commercial deliveries totaled **171 aircraft**, including 129 737s, 10 767s, 7 777s and 25 787s, bringing year-to-date commercial deliveries to **314** units. Defense, Space & Security delivered **35 new-build units** in the quarter, led by AH-64 Apache, CH-47 Chinook, F-15, F/A-18, KC-46 tanker, MH-139 and P-8 models, for **65 year-to-date** units. According to Boeing, delivery data cover new-build production, including remanufactures and modifications, and are preliminary until quarterly financial results are issued. * **171 commercial aircraft** delivered in Q2 2026, 314 year-to-date. * Defense, Space & Security: **35 units** delivered in Q2, 65 year-to-date. * KC-46 tanker program: **4 aircraft** delivered in Q2, 8 year-to-date. 737 YTD deliveries 243 aircraft Year-to-date 2026. Boeing delivered **171 commercial aircraft** and **35 defense units** in Q2 2026. Year-to-date 2026, Boeing reported **314 commercial aircraft** and **65 defense units** delivered.","score":0.960216,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.sahmcapital.com/news/content/boeing-reports-171-commercial-jet-deliveries-in-q2-2026-2026-07-14","title":"Boeing reports 171 commercial jet deliveries in Q2 2026","content":"Boeing reports 171 commercial jet deliveries in Q2 2026. * Boeing reported 2Q 2026 deliveries of 171 commercial jets, led by 129 737s. * Defense deliveries totaled 35 units in 2Q 2026, lifting year-to-date deliveries to 65.
